array.string:
set -e VPS_HOST="Administrator@43.163.107.158" DEST="$HOME/Backups/AI-SMC" SCP="/usr/bin/scp" SSH_OPTS="-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=30"
# Credentials (no plaintext in plist): prefer ssh-key, else ~/.aismc/env SSH_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/id_aismc" if [ -f "$SSH_KEY" ]; then SCP_AUTH=("$SCP" "-i" "$SSH_KEY") elif [ -f "$HOME/.aismc/env" ]; then . "$HOME/.aismc/env" # must export SSHPASS=... (chmod 600) if [ -z "${SSHPASS:-}" ]; then echo "FATAL: ~/.aismc/env must export SSHPASS" >&2 exit 1 fi SSHPASS_BIN="/opt/homebrew/bin/sshpass" SCP_AUTH=("$SSHPASS_BIN" "-e" "$SCP") export SSHPASS else echo "FATAL: configure ~/.ssh/id_aismc (preferred) or ~/.aismc/env" >&2 exit 1 fi
mkdir -p "$DEST/XAUUSD" "$DEST/BTCUSD"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Starting AI-SMC backup"
# XAUUSD "${SCP_AUTH[@]}" $SSH_OPTS -r \ "${VPS_HOST}:C:/AI-SMC/data/XAUUSD/." \ "$DEST/XAUUSD/" \ && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] XAUUSD backup OK" \ || echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] XAUUSD backup FAILED"
# BTCUSD "${SCP_AUTH[@]}" $SSH_OPTS -r \ "${VPS_HOST}:C:/AI-SMC/data/BTCUSD/." \ "$DEST/BTCUSD/" \ && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BTCUSD backup OK" \ || echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BTCUSD backup FAILED"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Backup run complete"
